flashcards.back: Change in position over time. An object moves when it's in a different location than before.
Relative! It depends on your reference frame. You're still relative to your chair, but moving relative to the sun.

flashcards.front: What 3 things are needed for motion?
flashcards.back: An object, a change in position, and time. All three together = motion.

flashcards.front: Why does motion matter in mechanics?
flashcards.back: Everything in mechanics—speed, acceleration, forces—builds on motion. It's the foundation.
